FINAL DISTRIBUTION HEARING (PAGA)
Off Calendar May-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: FINAL DISTRIBUTION HEARING (PAGA)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The supplemental declaration of Kevin Lee demonstrates that the settlement has been performed. The settlement administrator is ordered to remit all uncashed funds, totaling $8,120.93, to Legal Aid at Work within 30 days. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

FINAL DISTRIBUTION HEARING (PAGA)

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

FINAL DISTRIBUTION HEARING (PAGA).

Continued to May 27, 2026, because the check cashing deadline is April 15, 2026. Plaintiff shall file a declaration from the settlement administrator detailing the distribution by May 13, 2026.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
